title.rendered: [FREE WEBINAR] 6 Event Fundraising Tools that Raise the Most Revenue

content.rendered:
Date: Tuesday, August 2, 2022
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (1 Hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Rebecca Alfred, Charity Relationship Lead at Trellis.org

Nonprofits must invest their time and money into the event fundraising tools that are going to raise the most funds for their organization. This free value-packed webinar will feature the six most effective fundraising tools when planning in-person, virtual, and hybrid events. Topics include:

  1. Six modern event fundraising tools including online auctions, raffles, livestreaming, and more
  2. A breakdown of how much time and money nonprofits must invest in each tool and the revenue that each tool can be expected to raise in return
  3. What other nonprofits have done to minimize costs and maximize funds raised when using the six tools

It’s guaranteed that your nonprofit will leave with actionable and proven tactics to help you raise more money for your organization! The session will end with a live Q&A.

<<Register Now>>

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, please register for the webinar to receive the recording 24-48 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
